reviews.comment:
Ojo que es una bencinera de solo un tipo, solo 95, así que los que cargan 95 y 97 pasen a pasen por porvenir o río grande o en la de cerro sombrero que solo tiene 93.

(Translated by Google)
Note that it's a gas station that only has one type of fuel, only 95, so those who need 95 and 97 should go to Porvenir or Río Grande or to the one in Cerro Sombrero which only has 93.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/21560828516332243/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsOWVfN2ZnEAE

reviews.comment: Gas station open 24/7 - accepts payments in card and cash! The restaurant in the ACA attached is homely with great simple food, huge portions, and amazing service making you feel right at home. They also have a small store with anything you might need. Perfect to recharge on a long drive; do yourself a favor and stop here
